subtitle: everything must go
description: Eight years in Austin and it's time for a change. Rather than haul everything across the country, we'd love for our stuff to find good homes nearby.

contact.notes: Cash or Venmo. Pickup only, evenings after 6 or weekends.

about.heading: Why we're selling
about.body: We're moving cross-country. Everything here is in working condition, priced to move, and up for reasonable offers. Shoot us a note to set up a pickup time.
